creator: mgb@tdchosting.dk
text:
I have also been affected by this bug
Sven, who created this bug, found a workaround here
http://bugs.freedesktop.org/show_bug.cgi?id=20557
I have made a patch which can be place in the files directory
x11-servers/xorg-server/files
This seems to have solved our problem.

patch is attached
